items.name: Pakora
items.description: The mixture of different vegetables and chickpea batter, deep fried and served with homemade tomato sauce.

items.name: Samosa (2 pcs.)
items.description: Homemade pastry with the stuffing of boiled potatoes and peas and blended spices served with the dipping of sweet and sour tamrind sauce.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadeko
items.description: Fried soyabeans mixed with fresh ginger, garlic, onions ,tomatoes, chillies coriander, olive oil and lemon juice.

items.name: Aloo Sadeko
items.description: Boiled potatoes mixed with fresh ginger, garlic, onions, coriander and lemon juice.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Fried diced cottage cheese cooked with capsicum , onions and tomatoes in chilli and tomato sauce.

items.name: Paneer Pakoda (5 pcs.)
items.description: Cottage cheese dipped in chickpea batter , deep fried and served with sweet and sour tamrind sauce.

items.name: Meat Samosa (2 pcs.)
items.description: Homemade pastry with the stuffing of lamb mince meat, peas and blended spices served with sweet and sour tamrind sauce.

items.name: Momo
items.description: Chicken mince meat mixed with garlic ginger paste, coriander, onions and spices wrapped in homemade pastry and steamed. Served with homemade tomato chutney.

items.name: Chilli Momo
items.description: The homemade deepfried dumplings, cooked with the capsicum, tomatoes and onions with hot chilli and tomato sauce.

items.name: Fry Momo
items.description: Boiled potatoes mixed with fresh ginger, garlic, onions, coriander and lemon juice.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Fried crispy chicken pieces cooked with capsicum, onions and tomatoes in chilli and tomato sauce.

items.name: Chicken Drums
items.description: Chicken wings marinated in spices, deep fried in the oil served with the homemade tomato sauce.

items.name: Chilli Prawns
items.description: Fresh prawns cooked in the sweet tomato and hot sauce with freshly added capsicums, tomatoes and onions with the finishing of freshly chopped coriander.

items.name: Prawn Sadeko
items.description: Chargrilled prawns mixed with fresh ginger, garlic, mustard and olive oil with the refreshing lime juice served with salad on the base.

items.name: Lamb Choila
items.description: Charcoal cooked smokey lamb pieces mixed with fresh garlic ginger, coriander, spring onions, and lemon juice with the olive oil.

items.name: Chicken Pakoda
items.description: Tender chicken pieces dipped in chickpea batter and deepfried served with the homemade mint sauce.

items.name: Lil's Mixed Platter
items.description: Unique combination of both vegetarian and non vegetarian items of starters including aloo sadeko, veg samosa, chicken pakoda and chicken drums.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Chicken meat with bone marinated overnight in yogurt ginger garlic paste and other spices , cooked in charcoal and served with mint sauce. Done as full and half chicken.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Boneless chicken meat marinated overnight in yogurt, ginger garlic paste and many more spices and cooked in the charcoal served with the mint sauce.

items.name: BBQ Chicken
items.description: Chicken fillets marinated overnight with cumin , coriander powder and other mountainous spices in olive oil, Cooked in charcoal and served with the charcoal.

items.name: Seekh Kebab
items.description: Lamb mince meat mixed with fresh chopped coriander, ginger garlic paste mixed with different spices rolled over in the seekh stick and slow cooked in the charcoal.

items.name: Tandoori Prawn
items.description: Fresh prawns marinated overnight in yogurt, ginger garlic and spices, chargrilled and served with the homemade tomato chutney.

items.name: Lamb Sekuwa
items.description: Overnight marinated diced lamb meat in spices and ginger garlic paste cooked in the charcoal and served with the homemade tomato chutney.

items.name: Mixed Meat Sizzler
items.description: Mixture of all chargrilled meats on a sizzling plate with minty sauce on side. It includes tandoori chicken, chicken tikka, seekh kebab and prawns.

items.name: Panner tikka (Vegetarian)
items.description: Cottage cheese, capsicum and onion marinated in homemade ginger garlic paste with yogurt and spices served with the mint sauce on side.

items.description: Boiled potatoes and cauliflower cooked slowly in curry sauce with the perfect mixture of the spices.
